projectDescription: A REST API for accessing Taylor Swift's discography including albums, songs, and lyrics, hosted on Cloudflare Workers.
keyFeatures: Retrieve all Taylor Swift albums with release dates
Fetch all songs within a specific album
Get song information by song ID
Retrieve full lyrics for any song
Generate N paragraphs of lyrics for Lorem Ipsum-style placeholder content
Hosted on Cloudflare Workers with D1 database
publicApiSurface: GET /albums — Returns all Taylor Swift albums
GET /albums/{albumID} — Returns all songs within a specific album
GET /songs — Returns all songs across all albums
GET /songs/{songID} — Returns song information for a specific song
GET /lyrics/{songID} — Returns lyrics for a specific song
GET /lyrics?numberOfParagraphs={n}&shouldRandomizeLyrics={bool} — Returns N paragraphs of lyrics
